summary: Iteration 4 frontend-only verification of Shreyshth Sharma portfolio. All review-request items pass: interactive UBI simulator (slider + readout + recharts chart) works on desktop and mobile (~390px) with no horizontal overflow; contact emails reordered (Shreshth2002@gmail.com primary, shshar@iu.edu 'University (expiring)' second); contact form empty-submit shows error toast and filled submit POSTs to /api/contact (200) and triggers mailto handler; resume PDF reachable at /Shreyshth-Sharma-CV.pdf (HTTP 200 application/pdf); experience chronologically ascending (Marquee Jul 2022 → nTalents Jun 2023 → DLF Aug 2023 → TGTE Jan 2025); only 2 project cards (01 Intel, 02 UBI), project-03 removed; Interests section and nav link removed; footer 'Portfolio built with Emergent' present; About has single portrait (iu-wall.jpg) and static stats 4/8+/5/Global; mobile hamburger -> nav-mobile-menu opens; chat widget opens; page title 'Shreyshth Sharma | Finance & Quant Portfolio'.

issues: Recharts emits initial console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on first render because ResponsiveContainer measures before layout completes. Non-functional (chart renders correctly after layout). Can be silenced by giving the wrapper a min-height/min-width or rendering the chart only after first layout effect.

test_evidence.title: Shreyshth Sharma | Finance & Quant Portfolio
test_evidence.ubi_readout_initial_e0_8: At an elasticity of 0.80, UBI is modeled to reduce labor supply by ~6.4% (range 4.8%-8.0%).
test_evidence.ubi_readout_e0_0: At zero elasticity, UBI is modeled to leave labor supply essentially unchanged.
test_evidence.ubi_readout_e1_3: At an elasticity of 1.30, UBI is modeled to reduce labor supply by ~10.4% (range 7.8%-13.0%).
test_evidence.ubi_readout_mobile_e0_5: At an elasticity of 0.50, UBI is modeled to reduce labor supply by ~4.0% (range 3.0%-5.0%).

action_items: Optional polish only: silence the recharts 'width(-1)/height(-1)' initial-render warnings on UbiSimulator by giving the chart wrapper an explicit min-height (e.g., minHeight: 200) on ResponsiveContainer, or by gating the chart behind a useLayoutEffect-measured container width. Functional behavior is unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: mailto navigation via window.location.href fires after a successful /api/contact POST. In some browsers this also navigates away from the SPA. Consider using a hidden anchor click or window.open('mailto:...') with a small timeout so the toast remains visible and the SPA state is preserved.

UbiSimulator.jsx: ReferenceDot x is rounded to nearest 0.1 (Math.round(e*10)/10) but central is computed from the un-rounded e — when slider is at 1.35 the dot snaps to 1.4 while the central value reflects 1.35, causing a tiny mismatch between dot position and the line. Either round both or use the raw e for the dot x and let recharts interpolate.
UbiSimulator.jsx: data array is generated with floating-point steps (x += 0.1). Acceptable but produces values like 0.30000000000000004 before rounding; current rounding handles it, just noting.

Projects.jsx: UbiSimulator hard-coupled by p.index === '02'. If projects are ever reordered, the simulator would attach to the wrong card. Prefer a flag on the project object (e.g., p.interactive === 'ubi') for resilience.

Contact.jsx: PROFILE.emailAlt is used both for the visible primary email and the mailto destination on form submit, which is correct, but there is no client-side email validation beyond the HTML type=email — consider a small regex/yup check before POST.
seed_data_creation: One contact row created via /api/contact POST during form test (id 437b23ad-80b5-4d2c-846d-498d3b1a2b2c).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-4 features (UBI interactive sim, contact email reorder, mailto handler, ascending experience, 2-project list, removed Interests, serif fonts, mobile responsiveness, resume PDF) verified working via Playwright on desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844. Only optional cosmetic finding is the recharts initial 'width(-1)' console warning. Previous iteration_1 chat-toggle/Emergent-badge overlap finding is unchanged (still occluded by 'Made with Emergent' badge on desktop bottom-right; programmatic click works via JS .click but Playwright .click() may be intercepted).
